content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian left.

Return to your accommodation.

He continued to cultivate, and as for the supreme fruit of reincarnation, he would no longer use it, and was ready to leave it to the true body to copy the body to improve his cultivation and break the realm.

The cultivation of the real body copy body is the most important thing, and the Ao Chen copy body will definitely be abandoned in the future, but not now, there is no need to use too many good things on this copy body.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation, went around and around, and after making sure that there was no high-level follower of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, he went to the Immaculate Abyss through the crack in the Impure Abyss and sent the resources to the hands of the real body copy body.

It didn't take long.

Ao Chen's copy of the body saw the real copy of the body, and transferred a lot of resources.

After that, the Ao Chen's copy body quickly returned.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian took out a large amount of resources.

Treasures such as the Minia Divine Fruit and the Reincarnation Xuanlin Fruit can improve all aspects of cultivation and help him impact the fifth balance.

"With so many good things, my cultivation improvement speed will definitely fly fast, and it won't be too far away to break through to the fifth balance day!"

Subsequently.

He ate fruits such as the Minya Divine Fruit and the Samsara Xuanlin Fruit.

Rumble!!!!

The reincarnation Haotian origin and origin realm will in the body are all rapidly improving, and the body of reincarnation Haotian is also rapidly refining under the refining of strands of energy.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Ye Tian's strength was improving rapidly.

Of course.

Ao Chen's copy body also uses a lot of resources, and the speed of cultivation is not slow.

In addition, he is still creating the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation, but it is very difficult.

However, he has been researching and creating for a long time, and naturally it is impossible to give up.

Before you know it, more than 30 million primeval years have passed.

With such a long period of time, coupled with many good things, Ye Tian's cultivation has only been raised to the limit of the fourth balance.

This is also the difficulty of the fourth way.

However, the fourth path itself is terrifying, and he is now equivalent to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Seventh Awakening, which is equivalent to the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Seventh Awakening to raise their cultivation to the limit and attack the Eighth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm.

Therefore, it is already a quick time to spend.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords were absolutely envious when they knew that he had ascended to this realm so quickly.

After reaching the fourth balance limit, Ye Tian tried to hit the bottleneck, but he couldn't shake it.

This bottleneck is not an ordinary bottleneck, and it is impossible to easily break it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out a reincarnation supreme fruit, the reincarnation supreme fruit not only helped the reincarnation celestial clan awaken the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, but also helped Ye Tian break the realm, which was definitely a very good thing.

"I don't know if one reincarnation supreme fruit can help me break the realm, if not, then eat two reincarnation supreme fruits!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He immediately swallowed a supreme fruit of reincarnation, and then slammed into the fifth balance.

As the years passed, the bottleneck loosened and cracked.

However, just when the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation was about to run out of energy, the bottleneck was still not completely broken.

And.

In addition to the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation, he also used up a lot of resources and treasures, such as the three-source secret medicine, but it still couldn't help him break the realm.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out the second Reincarnation Supreme Fruit and swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!!

With the help of the second Reincarnation Supreme Fruit, the bottleneck was finally about to be broken.

Another long time has passed.

Click!!!

The bottleneck was completely shattered, and Ye Tian's body began to transform.

The body of reincarnation Haotian is transforming wildly, the origin of reincarnation Haotian is also growing rapidly, and the will of the origin realm is also increasing wildly.

Every moment, Ye Tian's aura was increasing.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai officially stepped into the realm of the fifth balance.

At this time, his strength is much stronger than before.

"The fifth balance is so much stronger than the fourth!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He tested his strength and estimated that it should be no different from the Wild Ancestor.

Of course, this kind of strength is not the real Eighth Awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord Invincible Realm.

Like some of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan or the Reincarnation Source Clan, if he has mastered the supreme divine power of reincarnation or is a genius who fights beyond the level, then he is still not an opponent.

Unless his copy body also mastered the supreme divine power of reincarnation, he could hope to be called the overlord of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm invincible.

After that, Ye Tian continued to create the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation.

Now, he is not far from successfully creating the supreme divine power of reincarnation, only the last point is left.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully imitated the Heavenly Spear of the Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power, although it is not the same, but it is also a reincarnation Supreme Divine Power!

Ye Tian was also named the Spear of the Ruins, but the power of this Spear of the Heavens was not as powerful as the genuine Spear of the Heavens, and the consumption was also large.

Tested.

The imitation Heaven Spear could only exert sixty percent of its power, but the consumption was double.

That's a big gap!

"It's not just me, it's also the reincarnation supreme powers created by other Origin Upper Realm Overlords. Only the awakened supreme power of reincarnation has great potential and power. Ye Tian said darkly.

But in any case, the reincarnation supreme divine power far surpasses the supreme magic on the other side, even if the consumption is very large, it can't be used many times, but if you face an enemy whose conventional combat power is similar to your own, you can bombard it with one move.

Therefore, the reincarnation supreme supernatural power is too terrifying, even if it is the overlord of the origin upper realm of the spicy chicken, he can rely on the reincarnation supreme supernatural power to contend with the enemy who is one realm higher than himself.

Of course, once the power is exhausted and you can't use the supreme power of reincarnation, then you won't be the opponent's opponent.

"I have now created the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation, and the Desolate Ancestor is no longer my opponent, relying on the Spear of the Ruins, I can severely damage him with one move!" Ye Tian muttered.

With his current strength, he felt that he was almost invincible in the land of the Eternal Shore, unless there was still a Ninth Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord in the Land of Eternity, but at least he had not heard of such an Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

"I now have enough strength to understand the secrets of the era of the Origin Ancestor, what is the relationship between the Dark Realm of Reincarnation, the Origin Domain of Reincarnation and the land on the other side of eternity?"

He was going to go to the Ancient Heavenly Palace to meet the Wild Ancestor.

As for whether the Wasted Ancestor is willing to see him, it is not for the Wasted Ancestor to decide!

Wow!

Ye Tian went directly to the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, and before he went, he summoned several Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace to inform him of this matter.
